offer: For small law firms processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate billing causes cash flow gaps. We convert legal case activity logs into client billing summaries instead of manual billing processes using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate billing summaries due to manual tracking of case activities.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for small law firms
Indie Hackers discussions about billing workflows
DM outreach to small law firms with demo video
Engage in community forums for legal tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of case activity logs
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a simple landing page with CTA
Produce a demo video of manual workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Save common inputs as templates for easy reuse
Set default reminder schedules for users
Enable CSV import for existing case data
Allow one-click export of billing reports
Streamline onboarding process with fewer steps
